title: Power intelligent agents with AI-native databases
summary: AI-native databases enable intelligent agents by providing enterprise data access through AI-powered search, natural language interfaces, and multimodal queries. These systems support graph retrieval-augmented generation to deliver high-fidelity interconnected context, with interoperability via Model Context Protocol and agentic IDEs.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video covers AI-native databases and how they power intelligent agents by exposing enterprise data through AI-powered search, natural language interfaces, and multimodal queries. It matters because agents need reliable, interconnected context to act on enterprise data. Key takeaways: these systems support graph retrieval-augmented generation to deliver high-fidelity, interconnected context, and they provide interoperability through the Model Context Protocol and agentic IDEs.
